title: Repurposed Structures - Sawmill Compat
description: Cut your wood in Sawmills found in RS villages!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. You will find the new Priest Houses in RS Overworld Villages! 

- Sawmill mod can be downloaded from here:

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here:

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric

## NOTE: in 1.21.1+ Sawmill mod has compat with Repurposed Structures. No compat mod or datapack needed for 1.21.1+

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F2W9IGLQ/images/7daeb10f1bd3c857260bdcbed9e3090394f797f9.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F2W9IGLQ/images/7daeb10f1bd3c857260bdcbed9e3090394f797f9.png)~~~~


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
